CATCARD_11.title: card.catcard1.title
CATCARD_11.subtitle: global.empty
CATCARD_11.description: THIS IS A CAT CARD AND IS POWERLESS ON ITS OWN.

GODCAT_1.title: GODCAT
GODCAT_1.subtitle: THE BEST OF THE BLESSED
GODCAT_1.description: PLAY AS ANY CARD IN THE GAME, EXCEPT A NOPE. AFTER PLAYING GODCAT, PUT IT BACK ON THE PLAYMAT.

CLONE_1.title: CLONE
CLONE_1.subtitle: FIND A PAIR OF NOSFERA-TWOS
CLONE_1.description: WHEN YOU PLAY THIS CARD, IT BECOMES WHATEVER CARD IS BENEATH IT.

CLONE_2.title: CLONE
CLONE_2.subtitle: MAKE YOUR VOODOO DOLLS DO ALL THE DIRTY WORK
CLONE_2.description: WHEN YOU PLAY THIS CARD, IT BECOMES WHATEVER CARD IS BENEATH IT.

CLONE_3.title: CLONE
CLONE_3.subtitle: WORK OUT THE KINKS LATER

SWAPTOPANDBOTTOM_1.title: SWAP TOP AND BOTTOM
SWAPTOPANDBOTTOM_1.subtitle: MAKE SOME POOR MEDICAL DECISIONS
SWAPTOPANDBOTTOM_1.description: SWAP THE TOP AND BOTTOM CARDS OF THE DRAW PILE.

SWAPTOPANDBOTTOM_2.title: SWAP TOP AND BOTTOM
SWAPTOPANDBOTTOM_2.subtitle: EXPERIMENT ON FRANKENCAT
SWAPTOPANDBOTTOM_2.description: SWAP THE TOP AND BOTTOM CARDS OF THE DRAW PILE.

SWAPTOPANDBOTTOM_3.description: SWAP THE TOP AND BOTTOM CARDS OF THE DRAW PILE.

DRAWFROMTHEBOTTOM_1.title: DRAW FROM THE BOTTOM
DRAWFROMTHEBOTTOM_1.subtitle: TAKE A BIG BITE OF YOUR COWARD SANDWICH
DRAWFROMTHEBOTTOM_1.description: END YOUR TURN BY DRAWING THE CARD AT THE BOTTOM OF THE DRAW PILE.

DRAWFROMTHEBOTTOM_2.title: DRAW FROM THE BOTTOM
DRAWFROMTHEBOTTOM_2.subtitle: PLAY A LEGENDARY JENGA MOVE
DRAWFROMTHEBOTTOM_2.description: END YOUR TURN BY DRAWING THE CARD AT THE BOTTOM OF THE DRAW PILE.

DRAWFROMTHEBOTTOM_3.title: DRAW FROM THE BOTTOM
DRAWFROMTHEBOTTOM_3.subtitle: INVENT A NEW ART FORM
DRAWFROMTHEBOTTOM_3.description: END YOUR TURN BY DRAWING THE CARD AT THE BOTTOM OF THE DRAW PILE.

TARGETEDATTACK_1.title: TARGETED ATTACK
TARGETEDATTACK_1.subtitle: DEPLOY THE GROIN-KICKING PANDA BEAR
TARGETEDATTACK_1.description: END YOUR TURN WITHOUT DRAWING A CARD. FORCE THE PLAYER OF YOUR CHOICE TO TAKE 2 TURNS. PLAY CONTINUES FROM THAT PLAYER.

TARGETEDATTACK_2.subtitle: FIRE THE FAT-HAMPSTER CATAPULT
TARGETEDATTACK_2.description: END YOUR TURN WITHOUT DRAWING A CARD. FORCE THE PLAYER OF YOUR CHOICE TO TAKE 2 TURNS. PLAY CONTINUES FROM THAT PLAYER.

TARGETEDATTACK_3.title: TARGETED ATTACK
TARGETEDATTACK_3.subtitle: UNLEASH A SHARK WHO HURTS WITH WORDS INSTEAD OF TEETH
TARGETEDATTACK_3.description: END YOUR TURN WITHOUT DRAWING A CARD. FORCE THE PLAYER OF YOUR CHOICE TO TAKE 2 TURNS. PLAY CONTINUES FROM THAT PLAYER.

TARGETEDATTACK_4.title: TARGETED ATTACK
TARGETEDATTACK_4.subtitle: UNLEASH THE RUNNING PIRANHA
TARGETEDATTACK_4.description: END YOUR TURN WITHOUT DRAWING A CARD. FORCE THE PLAYER OF YOUR CHOICE TO TAKE 2 TURNS. PLAY CONTINUES FROM THAT PLAYER.

WINNERWINNERCATNIPDINNER_1.title: WINNER WINNER CATNIP DINNER
WINNERWINNERCATNIPDINNER_1.subtitle: GET TEN BOXES FROM COSTCO
WINNERWINNERCATNIPDINNER_1.description: IF YOU HOLD THIS CARD FOR 4 FULL ROUNDS, YOU AUTOMATICALLY WIN.

RAGEBAIT_1.title: RAGEBAIT
RAGEBAIT_1.subtitle: GO FISHING ON AN ANGRY STOMACH
RAGEBAIT_1.description: SWITCH HANDS WITH A PLAYER OF YOUR CHOICE.

RECYCLE_1.title: RECYCLE
RECYCLE_1.subtitle: THROW DOG POOP IN YOUR NEIGHBOR'S RECYCLING BIN
RECYCLE_1.description: SHUFFLE THE DISCARD PILE. DRAW THE BOTTOM CARD TO TAKE ONE TURN.

DOUBLEUP_1.title: DOUBLE UP
DOUBLEUP_1.subtitle: SPLURGE AT IN-N-OUT
DOUBLEUP_1.description: DRAW AN EXTRA CARD AT THE END OF YOUR TURN.

CLEANUP_1.title: CLEAN UP
CLEANUP_1.subtitle: RELEASE THE CLEANING GOATS
CLEANUP_1.description: DRAW AN EXTRA CARD AT THE END OF YOUR TURN.
